steps.title: Identify the width variable
steps.content:
Let w be the width of the rectangle, in feet.

Since the length is 15 times the width, we have length = 15w.

steps.title: Interpret 15w as length
steps.content:
The area is given by y = (15w)(w). Since area = length × width, the factor (15w) must be the length.

Therefore, 15w represents the length of the rectangle, in feet.
That matches choice A — A is correct.
